spec.expr: topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (path, le) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{host=~"$host", container=~"$container"}[$__range]))))

(sum by(host) (netdata_disk_space_GiB_average{job="netdata_linux", dimension="used",host=~'$host'})) / (sum by(host) (netdata_disk_space_GiB_average{job="netdata_linux", dimension="used",host=~'$host'}) + sum by(host) (netdata_disk_space_GiB_average{job="netdata_linux", dimension="avail",host=~'$host'})) * 100

spec.description: Grafana-managed alerts currently firing or pending, filtered to the selected host(s). Shows each alert instance and how long it has been in state. Reads Grafana alerting directly (live).
spec.title: Firing Now - Current State (host-wise)

spec.expr: {from="state-history"} | json alertname="labels.alertname", host="labels.host", instance="labels.instance", current="current", previous="previous" | host=~"$host" | line_format "{{.alertname}}  @ {{.host}}{{.instance}}  :  {{.previous}} -> {{.current}}"

spec.description: Raw Grafana alert state-change events from the Loki state-history stream, newest first. Each line is one transition with its exact timestamp - the reliable companion to the timeline above.
spec.title: Alert State Changes - Raw History (Loki)

spec.expr: max by (alertname, host, instance) (last_over_time({from="state-history"} | json alertname="labels.alertname", host="labels.host", instance="labels.instance", current="current" | host=~"$host" | label_format sv=`{{ if eq .current "Alerting" }}3{{ else if eq .current "Pending" }}2{{ else if eq .current "NoData" }}4{{ else if eq .current "Error" }}5{{ else }}1{{ end }}` | unwrap sv [$__interval]))

spec.description: Per-alert state over time, reconstructed from the Loki state-history stream. Each lane is one alert (x host where labelled); colour = state (red Alerting / yellow Pending / green Normal / purple NoData / orange Error). A bar's left edge is when that state began, the right edge when it changed. Hover for exact timestamps. Needs transitions to have been written since the Loki backend was enabled.
spec.title: Alert State Timeline (Loki, host-wise)
